summary.note: To są propozycje klasyfikatora etapu 1. Nie podłączaj mapy do strony przed etapem weryfikacji.

applications.shortPl: Tkaniny mundurowe ArDura (PA 6.6) dla wojska i policji, kombinezony pirotechniczne, siatki maskujące, dzianiny 3D.
applications.shortEn: ArDura (PA 6.6) uniform fabrics for military and police, bomb-disposal suits, camouflage mesh, 3D warp knits.
applications.include: Military, police, uniformed services, tactical uniforms, bomb-disposal suits, camouflage or service equipment explicitly stated in the product data.
applications.exclude: Do not match generic durable workwear, generic PA 6.6, ripstop or cut resistance unless military, police, tactical or uniformed-service use is explicitly stated.

applications.shortPl: Ubrania bojowe: tkanina ArBo z włóknem PBO — najwytrzymalsza syntetyczna tkanina świata, badana według EN 469.
applications.shortEn: Turnout gear: ArBo fabric with PBO fibre — the world’s strongest synthetic fabric, tested to EN 469.
applications.include: Structural firefighting, turnout gear, firefighter suits or fabrics explicitly described for fire brigades and firefighting protective clothing.
applications.exclude: Do not match merely because a fabric is flame-retardant, heat-resistant or aramid. Generic FR workwear belongs elsewhere unless firefighter use is explicit.

applications.shortPl: Ochrona przed łukiem elektrycznym i tkaniny antystatyczne. Rodzina ArWoWear EMK: ekranowanie EMI, ochrona przy wysokim napięciu.
applications.shortEn: Electric-arc protection and antistatic fabrics. The ArWoWear EMK family: EMI shielding and high-voltage protection.
applications.include: Electrical utilities, electric-arc protection, high-voltage work, electrical installations or EMI shielding explicitly connected with electrical/electronic environments.
applications.exclude: Antistatic or flame-retardant properties alone are insufficient. Do not infer the energy sector from EN 1149 or FR performance alone.

applications.shortPl: Tkaniny chroniące przed rozbryzgiem metalu, ciepłem i płomieniem: bawełna FR, mieszanki antystatyczne.
applications.shortEn: Fabrics protecting against metal splash, heat and flame: FR cotton and antistatic blends.
applications.include: Welding, foundry, metallurgy, molten-metal splash, metalworking or explicitly stated heat/flame hazards in industrial metal processing.
applications.exclude: Generic FR workwear is insufficient unless welding, foundry, metallurgy, molten metal or closely related metal-processing use is explicit.

applications.shortPl: Tkaniny ArDura (PA 6.6) i denim odporny na ścieranie. Produkcja na bazie włókien CORDURA®.
applications.shortEn: ArDura (PA 6.6) fabrics and abrasion-resistant denim. Manufactured with CORDURA® fibres.
applications.include: Motorcycle protective apparel, motorcyclist garments or materials explicitly developed for motorcycle abrasion, impact-zone or riding apparel.
applications.exclude: Do not match automotive upholstery, vehicle interiors or generic abrasion-resistant clothing without explicit motorcycle use.

applications.shortPl: Rodzina dzianin ArNeo — ponad 15 wariantów tkanin fluorescencyjnych, także w wersji trudnopalnej.
applications.shortEn: The ArNeo family — over 15 fluorescent warp knit variants, including flame-retardant versions.
applications.include: Certified high-visibility warning clothing, fluorescent safety garments or explicit EN ISO 20471 / safety-jacket use.
applications.exclude: Bright colour, neon colour or reflective appearance alone is insufficient without explicit high-visibility safety use.

applications.shortPl: Tkaniny antywirusowe i antybakteryjne na odzież medyczną wielokrotnego użytku oraz tkaniny barierowe.
applications.shortEn: Antiviral and antibacterial fabrics for reusable medical wear, plus barrier fabrics.
applications.include: Medical, healthcare, hospital, protective medical garments, medical barriers, or antibacterial/antiviral products explicitly positioned for medical use.
applications.exclude: Antibacterial, antiviral, waterproof or easy-clean properties alone are insufficient if the source does not state a medical or healthcare use.

applications.shortPl: Dzianiny funkcyjne: oddychające, szybkoschnące, z ochroną UV i wykończeniem antybakteryjnym.
applications.shortEn: Functional knits: breathable, quick-drying, with UV protection and antibacterial finishes.
applications.include: Sportswear, athletic garments, training apparel or explicitly stated performance-sport use.
applications.exclude: Stretch, breathability, mesh or moisture management alone are insufficient without explicit sport or athletic use.

applications.shortPl: Membrany architektoniczne, sufity napinane, tekstylne elementy wnętrz oraz materiały przeznaczone bezpośrednio do budownictwa.
applications.shortEn: Architectural membranes, stretch ceilings, textile interior systems and fabrics explicitly intended for building applications.
applications.include: Architectural membranes, tensile structures, stretch ceilings, textile building systems, interior tension panels, light-diffusing architectural textiles or products explicitly intended as part of a building.
applications.exclude: Do not match ordinary apparel, generic outdoor fabric, furniture fabric, flags, cleaning textiles or print media. Tents and awnings qualify only when the source explicitly frames them as architectural/building systems.
applications.overlap: Stretch-ceiling products belong to architecture-building when the product data explicitly states a ceiling or architectural building-system use.

applications.shortPl: Tkaniny do samochodów, kolei, transportu publicznego, jednostek pływających oraz wyposażenia i tapicerki pojazdów.
applications.shortEn: Fabrics for automotive, rail, public transport, marine vessels, vehicle equipment, interiors and upholstery.
applications.include: Automotive, rail, public transport, marine/boat, aircraft, vehicle seating, vehicle interiors, transport upholstery or technical equipment explicitly intended for vehicles or vessels.
applications.exclude: Do not match ordinary footwear, furniture upholstery or generic outdoor fabric. Motorcycle protective clothing stays under motorcycle and does not automatically inherit transport.
applications.overlap: A product may match motorcycle and transport only when the supplied data independently states both uses.
